claim.label: Q4 2025 gross logo churn
claim.raw_text: Gross logo churn was 3.1% for Q4.

evidence.span_text:
Metric governance
People counts are maintained by People Operations. Customer counts and retention are sourced from the revenue
operations snapshot dated 5 January 2026. No quarterly gross logo churn metric was approved for this review
cycle.

verdict.rationale: The operations review explicitly states that no quarterly gross logo churn metric was approved for the Q4 2025 review cycle, and the customer appendix provides only period-end customer counts (no churned-logo counts), so no vault span confirms or refutes the claimed 3.1% figure.
verdict.suggested_action: Request the gross logo churn calculation (churned logos / starting logos) from revenue operations, since the metric was not approved for management reporting and cannot be derived from the customer appendix alone.
